# Mashhor Hub — mashhor-hub.com
> Marketing Consultant · AI Specialist · Creative Director · Kuwait

## About
Mashhor Hub is a marketing consultant, AI specialist, and creative director based in Hawalli, Kuwait. He has 10+ years of experience across performance marketing, media buying, creative direction, branding, and AI automation. Certified by Anthropic (Claude 101, AI Fluency), Meta (Blueprint), Google (Skillshop), and Snapchat.

## Ventures
- **Mashhor Hub** (mashhor-hub.com) — Kuwait LLC · Influencer marketing platform connecting GCC brands with talent
- **Mashhor Cloud** (mashhor.cloud) — AI-powered SaaS platform for influencer discovery, analytics, and campaign management
- **Munjiz** (munjiz-eg.com) — Egyptian government services e-platform licensed by Ministry of Communications
- **MR Portfolio** (mashhor-hub.com) — Personal brand · 143+ projects · 114+ clients

## Services
1. Performance Marketing & Media Buying (Meta, Google, TikTok, Snapchat)
2. AI Automation (Make.com, n8n, Claude API, GPT-4o integration)
3. Creative Direction & Video Production
4. Strategic Consulting & Corporate Training
5. Brand Identity Audit & Analysis
6. Full Campaign Management

## Blog Topics
- AI in marketing and agency operations
- Snapchat & social media advertising in Kuwait/GCC
- Creative strategy and ad psychology
- Prompt engineering for marketers
- Brand building and positioning

## Languages
- Arabic (Native)
- English (Professional)

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +965 6509 9769

- Instagram: @mohamedreda.gfx
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/mohamedreda-gfx
- Location: Hawalli, Kuwait (Remote worldwide)

## Technical Architecture
- Static HTML/CSS/JS site with bilingual support (EN + AR/RTL)
- Performant Native JS: IntersectionObserver for animations (no external libraries like AOS), `defer` on scripts, and cache-busting versioning.
- MR Assistant: Custom conversational UI Chatbot with `localStorage` persistence.
- PWA Support: `manifest.json` with shortcuts, `sw.js` (v8) Service Worker for offline capability.
- Security & Standards: Content-Security-Policy enabled, `security.txt` per RFC 9116 integrated.
- Sitemaps & Feeds: https://mashhor-hub.com/sitemap.xml, https://mashhor-hub.com/sitemap-images.xml, and RSS 2.0 feed at https://mashhor-hub.com/blog/feed.xml
